ast.name: appendText
ast.source: in note properties to sync a note to your Cloudflare KV namespace.
ast.target: 在笔记属性中以将笔记同步到您的 Cloudflare KV 命名空间。

ast.source: This would create a KV pair with the key:
ast.target: 这将创建一个键为：的 KV 对。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The Cloudflare account ID that holds the KV namespace
ast.target: 持有 KV 命名空间的 Cloudflare 账户 ID

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The Cloudflare KV namespace ID where your content is stored
ast.target: 存储您内容的 Cloudflare KV 命名空间 ID

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Cloudflare API token with KV read/write permissions
ast.target: 具有 KV 读写权限的 Cloudflare API 令牌

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the boolean property name that determines whether the note will be synced
ast.target: 决定笔记是否将被同步的布尔属性名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether notes should be automatically synced when they are modified
ast.target: 笔记修改后是否应自动同步

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait before syncing after modifying a note
ast.target: 修改笔记后等待多久再进行同步

ast.target: 将当前文件同步到 Cloudflare KV

ast.name: name
ast.source: Sync all marked files to Cloudflare KV
ast.target: 将所有标记的文件同步到 Cloudflare KV

ast.name: text
ast.source: You may optionally add a "collection" property, the value of which will be added as a prefix to the ID property when stored in KV.
ast.target: 您可以选择性地添加一个“collection”属性，其值将在存储到 KV 时作为 ID 属性的前缀。
